game_name: Castle of Illusion Starring Mickey Mouse

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Win condition: collect all gems to access final level

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After collecting all 5 gems from main levels

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation across five main levels with mandatory boss gates; final gem-locked tower provides climactic tension

difficulty_curve.early_game: Enchanted Forest introduces mechanics in safe context; designed to accommodate younger players with accessible platforming
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Toyland, Storm, and Dessert Factory escalate enemy complexity and introduce environmental hazards; increased platforming precision required
difficulty_curve.late_game: Library and Castle levels feature advanced enemy types (spiders, armored knights) and storm hazards; final boss Mizrabel requires mastery of bounce mechanics
notable_spikes: First boss encounter introduces combat pattern
Armored knights and spider enemy introduction
Final boss: giant Mizrabel requires pattern recognition and sustained engagement

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Linear progression with mandatory boss gates
notable_level_patterns.description: Each of five main levels (Enchanted Forest, Toyland, Storm, Dessert Factory, Library) ends with a Master of Illusion boss fight that yields a gem; gems are required to progress to final level
Each level features distinct visual theme and enemy roster (mushrooms in forest, toy soldiers in toyland, weather effects in storm, etc.) maintaining visual interest across campaign
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Toyland features toy soldiers and unicycle clowns; Desert Factory has food-themed environment

notable_level_patterns.description: First five levels each award one gem at end of boss fight; final two levels (Library, Castle) award gems halfway through, breaking the pattern and introducing final challenge structure
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Library and Castle break typical gem-at-end pattern

notable_level_patterns.description: Easy mode provides abbreviated versions of first three levels with no boss fights, allowing skill-based difficulty selection early in campaign
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Available from start; covers Enchanted Forest, Toyland, Storm (truncated)
